title: K Largest Elements
description: Given n integers and k, output the k largest elements in non-decreasing order.
inputSpec: First line: n and k. Second line: n integers.
outputSpec: The k largest elements in non-decreasing order.

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and k=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in Array.sort compare a;for i=n-k to n-1 do Printf.printf"%d%c" a.(i)(if i<n-1 then ' ' else '\n') done
